comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Phase 0 is complete. tau-yimj is closed with new regression suites in extensions/tau/test/ralph-{store,service,adapter}.test.ts plus the existing fresh-session helper coverage. Verified with targeted Ralph tests and `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`; review loop result was spec PASS and quality APPROVED. Next active task is tau-jsvt for strict Schema-backed Ralph domain models and typed errors. Follow-up bug tau-xvkb tracks the archive basename prefix edge case discovered during freeze-pass testing.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Phase 1 is complete. tau-jsvt is closed with src/ralph/schema.ts + src/ralph/errors.ts, strict persisted-state decode wired into Ralph, sanitized loop-name validation, and boundary reporting for invalid persisted state. Verified with targeted Ralph schema/regression tests plus `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`; review loop result was spec PASS and quality APPROVED. Next active task is tau-ezqm for Effect-native repo/controller extraction.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Phase 2/3 extraction is complete. tau-ezqm is closed with FileSystem-backed Ralph repo extraction in src/ralph/repo.ts and Effect-native controller logic in src/services/ralph.ts. The Ralph core now uses Ref + Deferred coordination instead of module-global current-loop / agent-end Promise state, while command-owned session actions remain at the boundary through a narrow adapter in src/ralph/index.ts. Added focused repo/core tests and re-verified all Ralph regressions plus `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`. Review loop result was spec PASS and quality APPROVED. Next active task is tau-kysw for adapter/runtime wiring polish and app-layer integration.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Phase 5/6 boundary/runtime wiring is complete. tau-kysw is closed with app-owned Ralph runtime wiring in src/app.ts, initRalph converted to an injected runEffect adapter, and a shutdown-order fix that lets Ralph's session_shutdown save run before app runtime disposal. Added app-runtime coverage for the shutdown ordering plus updated Ralph harnesses. Verified with targeted app/Ralph tests and `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate`; review loop result was spec PASS and quality APPROVED. Next active task is tau-8yog for removing any leftover Ralph legacy compatibility and final verification.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Phase 7/10 final cleanup is complete. tau-8yog finished with a thin Ralph adapter boundary, domain-owned command/state flows in src/services/ralph.ts, schema-validated persisted state, command-owned session actions preserved, architectural guard tests added, and final verification via `cd extensions/tau && npm run gate` plus `npm run effect:diagnostics` (remaining diagnostics are outside Ralph). Review loop result for the final slice: spec PASS, quality APPROVED. Follow-up bug tau-xvkb remains open and is outside the completed migration epic scope.
